paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **disentangled attention**—separately encoding content and positional information—and an **Enhanced Mask Decoder** to incorporate absolute word positions during decoding, improving upon BERT and RoBERTa.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (12GB), BookCorpus (6GB), OPENWEBTEXT (38GB), STORIES (~31GB) — total ~78GB after deduplication
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), Question Answering, Text Classification, Reading Comprehension
raw_extraction.license: Closed Source (code/models released via Microsoft/HuggingFace Transformers)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding and generation via better attention mechanisms and pre-training objectives
raw_extraction.extension: Enhanced Mask Decoder incorporates absolute word positions right before softmax layer for masked token prediction, complementing disentangled attention.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **disentangled attention**—separately encoding content and positional information—and an **Enhanced Mask Decoder** to incorporate absolute word positions during decoding, improving upon BERT and RoBERTa.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (12GB), BookCorpus (6GB), OPENWEBTEXT (38GB), STORIES (~31GB) — total ~78GB after deduplication
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), Question Answering, Text Classification, Reading Comprehension
raw_extraction.license: Closed Source (code/models released via Microsoft/HuggingFace Transformers)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding and generation via better attention mechanisms and pre-training objectives
raw_extraction.extension: Enhanced Mask Decoder incorporates absolute word positions right before softmax layer for masked token prediction, complementing disentangled attention.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: **Scaled-up version** of DeBERTa with 48 Transformer layers and 1.5B parameters, achieving state-of-the-art performance on SuperGLUE benchmark while surpassing human baselines. Uses disentangled attention and Enhanced Mask Decoder.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia (12GB), BookCorpus (6GB), OPENWEBTEXT (38GB), STORIES (~31GB) — total ~78GB after deduplication
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), Zero-shot Learning, SuperGLUE Benchmark Tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed Source (code/models released via Microsoft/HuggingFace Transformers)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling transformer models to achieve superior performance on complex NLP benchmarks
raw_extraction.extension: Enhanced Mask Decoder incorporates absolute word positions right before softmax layer for masked token prediction, complementing disentangled attention.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Disentangled attention mechanism and Enhanced Mask Decoder applied at scale, achieving state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (MNLI, SQuAD), reasoning (SuperGLUE), and cross-lingual tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling up DeBERTa to improve performance on complex NLU tasks while maintaining computational efficiency.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning with Virtual Adversarial Training (VAT)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Further scales disentangled attention and Enhanced Mask Decoder, improving performance on SuperGLUE and other benchmarks.
raw_extraction.application: Advanced natural language understanding, including SuperGLUE benchmark tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating scalability and performance trade-offs of DeBERTa at larger model sizes.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning with Virtual Adversarial Training (VAT)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: **First model to surpass human performance on SuperGLUE macro-average score (90.3)** using disentangled attention, Enhanced Mask Decoder, and convolutional side layers for n-gram knowledge induction. Achieves superior energy efficiency compared to T5 (11B).
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose natural language understanding, including SuperGLUE, MNLI, SQuAD, and reasoning tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving human-competitive performance on complex NLU benchmarks with improved efficiency.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning with Virtual Adversarial Training (VAT)
raw_extraction.extension: Projection matrix sharing for relative position embeddings reduces parameter count while retaining performance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: **Disentangled attention mechanism** combining content-based and relative position-based attention scores, along with **Enhanced Mask Decoder (EMD)** for improved masked token reconstruction.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU), question answering, sentiment analysis, paraphrase detection, natural language inference, reading comprehension, coreference resolution, word sense disambiguation, and text generation.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding through enhanced pre-training techniques, particularly disentangled attention and mask decoding.
raw_extraction.extension: **Span masking** strategy with spans up to three tokens, combined with absolute position embeddings in the input layer.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: **Disentangled attention mechanism** combining content-based and relative position-based attention scores, along with **Enhanced Mask Decoder (EMD)** for improved masked token reconstruction.
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU), question answering, sentiment analysis, paraphrase detection, natural language inference, reading comprehension, coreference resolution, word sense disambiguation, and text generation.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language understanding through enhanced pre-training techniques, particularly disentangled attention and mask decoding.
raw_extraction.extension: **Span masking** strategy with spans up to three tokens, combined with absolute position embeddings in the input layer.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: **Joint pre-training** with Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Autoregressive Language Modeling (ARLM) objectives, enabling autoregressive text generation while retaining the benefits of disentangled attention.
raw_extraction.application: Text generation, language modeling, and autoregressive tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling autoregressive text generation while maintaining high-quality language understanding capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) + Autoregressive Language Modeling (ARLM)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Autoregressive language modeling for text generation
raw_extraction.extension: **Triangular attention mask** for autoregressive decoding, similar to GPT-style models.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.organization: Unknown (Authors: Pengcheng He, Xiaodong Liu, Jianfeng Gao, Weizhu Chen)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Disentangled Attention** and replaces the traditional Masked Language Modeling (MLM) objective with **Replaced Token Detection (RTD)**, improving parameter efficiency and performance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Same 160GB data corpus used in DeBERTa (unspecified exact sources but aligned with prior works like BERT/RoBERTa)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering (SQuAD v2.0), natural language inference (MNLI), and downstream NLP tasks.
raw_extraction.license: null (not explicitly stated in the provided content)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Parameter-efficient pre-trained language models with enhanced accuracy and efficiency over BERT/RoBERTa.
raw_extraction.extension: **Disentangled Attention** mechanism enables better separation of attention heads for improved contextual understanding.

raw_extraction.organization: Unknown (Authors: Pengcheng He, Xiaodong Liu, Jianfeng Gao, Weizhu Chen)
raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of DeBERTa-base with deeper architecture and wider layers, maintaining parameter efficiency while achieving superior performance on MNLI and SQuAD v2.0.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Same 160GB data corpus used in DeBERTa (unspecified exact sources but aligned with prior works like BERT/RoBERTa)
